summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of P6 MOD-003 'He cocinado esto' (Confirmar Cocinado) flow. Verified all critical UI interactions, modal functionality, servings controls, per-row editing/removal, basic/quarantine ingredient handling, and loop closure. Main agent previously verified database writes (pantry subtraction with floor-at-zero, cooking_history insertion) via SQL queries.
passed_tests: Login with test credentials (kitchenbase.dev.tester@gmail.com)
Library screen loads correctly
'He cocinado esto' button is ENABLED and ALWAYS visible (no disabled state, no 'Próximamente' badge)
'He cocinado esto' button visible on green recipe (independent of semaphore color)
'Añadir a la Lista de la Compra' button from P5 remains unchanged (only visible when missing > 0)
MOD-003 modal opens when clicking 'He cocinado esto'
Modal subtitle 'Te lo descontamos de la despensa. Ajusta lo que necesites antes de confirmar.' displays correctly
Servings input pre-filled with recipe.servings value
Servings increment (+) button works correctly
Servings decrement (-) button works correctly
Real-time rescaling: non-overridden ingredient rows rescale proportionally when servings change
Per-row quantity editing: editing a row sets override flag and prevents rescaling on subsequent servings changes
Per-row remove: clicking trash icon marks row as removed with strike-through and 'Quitado del descuento' caption
Per-row restore: clicking restore icon (RotateCcw) re-includes removed row
Basic ingredients (is_basic=true) display 'Básico — no se descuenta' caption with no editable quantity input
Quarantine ingredients (user_ingredient_id set / is_pending) display 'Pendiente — no se descuenta' caption with no editable quantity input
Summary caption displays correct discount count and skipped basic/pending counts
No semaphore colors (data-semaphore attribute) inside MOD-003 modal
Cancel button closes modal without database writes
Confirm button triggers pantry discount and cooking_history insertion (verified by main agent via SQL)
Modal closes after successful confirm
Page refreshes after cooking to recompute semaphore status (loop closure verified)
Tested with 'Ensalada Verde P4.1-seed' (green recipe with basic ingredients)
Tested with 'Yogur con Miel P4.1-seed' (recipe with quarantine ingredient 'Miel P4.1-seed')

success_percentage.backend: N/A (Supabase-based, no backend API to test)
